idea-plugin.name: marimo
idea-plugin.description:
marimo is a reactive Python notebook. This plugin brings the full marimo editor inside PyCharm and other JetBrains IDEs, so you can open, edit, and run notebooks without leaving your IDE.

marimo notebooks are stored as plain .py files — no JSON, no hidden output state — so they diff cleanly, review like code, and run as scripts. The plugin detects which Python files are marimo notebooks and opens them in a dedicated reactive editor tab; everything else opens in the normal Python editor.

Features

  • Reactive editor, in the IDE — cells re-run automatically when their inputs change.
  • Interactive widgets — sliders, tables, plots, and other mo.ui elements work inline.
  • SQL cells, variables, and dependency panels — the full marimo experience.
  • Runs on your project interpreter — with a one-click offer to install marimo when it's missing.
  • Isolated sandbox runs — optionally launch a notebook in a one-off uv environment.
  • Pair with marimo — open a pairing prompt in JetBrains AI Chat when available, or attach a terminal harness.
  • Theme-aware — the editor follows your IDE's light/dark theme.

Requirements: PyCharm 2026.1+ (or another JetBrains IDE with the Python plugin) and a configured project interpreter. uv is optional, used only for sandbox runs.

Open source — github.com/marimo-team/jetbrains-marimo.

action.description: Show this marimo notebook's raw Python source
Run this marimo notebook in an isolated uv environment

group.description: Start an AI harness paired on this marimo notebook, or copy its prompt
